swd.screen.config.title: Simple World Downloader Habaynta
swd.status.villager_trade_saved: > Xogta ganacsiga tuulada waa la kaydiyay.
swd.status.enderchest_saved: > Waxyaabaha ku jira sanduuqa ender waa la kaydiyay.
swd.status.container_saved: > Waxyaabaha ku jira weelka waa la kaydiyay.
swd.status.queue_full: > Safka keydinta waa buuxaa! Lama keydin &s
swd.status.itemframe_saved: > Macluumaadka sanduuqa alaabta waa la keydiyay.
swd.tooltip.resume_downloads.1: Deji haddii keydinta dib loo bilaabayo
swd.tooltip.resume_downloads.2: haddii la helo keyd kale oo adduunka ah.
swd.tooltip.save_world_to.2: Haddii adduun magacaas leh horay u jiray,
swd.tooltip.save_world_to.3: chunks cusub ayaa qaybo ka badali doona adduunkaas.
swd.tooltip.auto_download.1: Deji haddii adduunadu u soo dejinayaan
swd.tooltip.auto_download.2: si toos ah markaad servarka ku biirto.
swd.tooltip.include_player_data.1: Deji haddii xogta ciyaartoyga la keydsanayo
swd.tooltip.include_resource_packs.2: la keydsanayo adduunka la soo dejiyay.
